COP29 partners reach agreement on allocation of USD 300 bln.
24 Nov 2024 00:15
1012239
COP29
Share
https://news.az/news/cop29-partners-reach-agreement-on-allocation-of-usd-300-bln
Copied
COP29
COP29 participating parties have confirmed a decision on climate finance,
News.az
reports.
The decision in this regard has been made at the final meeting of COP29.
Thus, sides have reached a final agreement on allocation of USD 300 billion until 2035 for climate finance.
